stemHtml: A pilot is flying an aircraft in the NAT HLA along the westbound Organised Track System (OTS) and intends to follow an OTS Track for its entire length. If the aircraft is properly equipped, the pilot may plan to cruise at any…

options.a: of the levels published for that track in the current NAT track message.
options.b: odd level between FL285 and FL420 inclusive.
options.c: even level between FL285 and FL420 inclusive.
options.d: of the levels between FL285 and FL420 inclusive, excluding FL390, which is reserved for State aircraft.
